title: Thaumcraft Integration
description: A mod that integrates aspects of Thaumcraft into other modifications that do not support it.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/867/481/logo.png)

[**CURSE PAGE**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft-integration)

[**DISCORD**](https://discord.com/invite/G6VEaBKcYt)

**Thaumcraft Integration** adds **Thaumcraft 6/4 aspect support** to mods that do not provide it out of the box on **Minecraft**.

The mod includes:
- Direct aspect integration for supported mods;
- Broad OreDictionary-based integration for many additional mods;
- Infernal Furnace smelting bonuses for extra ores and materials;
- Custom metal clusters + metal purification recipes/research for integrated metals.

### Direct integrations (TC6 / 1.12.2)

- Applied Energistics 2
- Astral Sorcery
- Blood Magic
- Mekanism
- Immersive Engineering
- Immersive Petroleum
- Electroblob's Wizardry
- Wither Skeleton Tweaks (Wither Skeleton Fix)

### OreDictionary-based integrations

Partially integrates aspects for content from:

- Avaritia 1.1x
- Biomes O' Plenty
- BuildCraft
- Draconic Evolution
- Forestry
- Binnie's Mods
- Immersive Engineering
- IndustrialCraft 2 Experimental / IC2 Classic
- Industrial Foregoing
- The Aether (1)
- Thermal Series
- Tinkers' Construct
- Mystical Agriculture
- Mystical Agradditions
- Ender IO
- PneumaticCraft: Repressurized
- Totemic
- NuclearCraft
- DivineRPG
- Galacticraft (and addons)
- Pam's HarvestCraft
- ProjectRed
- and other mods using compatible OreDictionary entries

OreDictionary list: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Ytp25U5-H3lQR9Co3NFsl0lk4EVEQQBfl7K0ZvDhYt8/edit?usp=sharing

You can use this mod in modpacks.

When TC7 by Team COFH is release, i will port this mod for new version.

You can support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/shadowking21)!
